title: VDD blocking_loop: builder tokens accumulated from revision responses but initial builder cost never charged
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dimension: Functional Correctness. Location: src/vdd/mod.rs:402-613 (blocking_loop). Violation: session.builder_tokens.accumulate(&builder_tokens) at L544 adds only revision costs to the session ledger. The initial builder response (which caused us to enter the loop) passes builder_tokens through initial_builder_response: &Value but is never accumulated. For a loop that terminates on iteration 1 with no revisions needed, session.builder_tokens reports zero — misleading cost accounting shown to the user. Mandated Refactor: Extract initial builder TokenUsage from initial_builder_response via extract_token_usage (or via the adapter, see dup-parsing issue) at the top of blocking_loop and accumulate it. Add an assertion that session.builder_tokens >= initial response tokens at session end.
